actions.value:
I have recorded a demonstration video for you to adjust your device settings.   
 
Our goal here is specifically to give "camera permissions" to your browser application.   
 
Please follow along turn on "camera permissions" for the following apps from within your device's settings:  
• Your primary browser application  
• Any Google browser: Chrome, Google, etc.  
• Edge Wallet  
 
Once you have done that, you should be able to complete any verification that requires a camera.   
 
Let us know if you have any other questions or concerns.
